source: Kaggle: redwankarimsony/heart-disease-data (UCI combined: Cleveland, Hungary, Switzerland, VA Long Beach)

feature_descriptions.trestbps: Resting blood pressure (mm Hg on admission)
feature_descriptions.oldpeak: ST depression induced by exercise relative to rest
feature_descriptions.slope: Slope of the peak exercise ST segment
feature_descriptions.ca: Number of major vessels (0-3) colored by fluoroscopy
feature_descriptions.thal: Thalassemia result (normal / fixed defect / reversible defect)
feature_descriptions.num: Diagnosis of heart disease (0 = absent, 1 = present; binarized from original 0-4 severity scale)
